name: T-Mobile US, Inc.
summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. is a U.S. wireless communications and broadband services provider operating under the T-Mobile, Metro by T-Mobile, and Mint Mobile brands. As of December 31, 2025, it serves 142.4 million postpaid and prepaid customers. The company offers wireless service plans, 5G fixed wireless broadband, wholesale wireless services, and sells smartphones, wearables, tablets, 5G broadband gateways, and accessories through retail stores, websites, and third-party distributors.

products.name: T-Mobile Wireless Service Plans
products.description: Postpaid and prepaid wireless communications service plans for consumers and businesses.

products.name: 5G Fixed Wireless Broadband
products.description: Home broadband internet service delivered over T-Mobile's 5G network via broadband gateways.

products.name: Wholesale Wireless Services
products.description: Wireless network access sold to third-party partners who resell services to their own customers.

products.name: Metro by T-Mobile
products.description: Prepaid wireless brand offered through owned retail stores and online channels.

products.name: Mint Mobile
products.description: Wireless brand with services available via app and website.

products.name: T-Life App
products.description: Customer-facing app enabling upgrades, add-a-line, and switching transactions digitally.

products.name: 5G Network
products.description: Nationwide multi-layer 5G network using low-band, mid-band, and mmWave spectrum.

products.name: Wireless Devices and Accessories
products.description: Smartphones, wearables, tablets, 5G broadband gateways sold to customers and dealers.

partnerships.description: Controlling stockholder of T-Mobile US, Inc.
